title: Doflamingo Warns the Marines
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on doflamingo warns the marines within the The World Reacts to Doflamingo's Fall storyline.
scene: Dressrosa's aftermath spreads outward: civilians, rulers, Marines, Doflamingo, Jack, and the Straw Hats all react to the new political balance.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Once we have finished this escort mission,

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: I'll be off on my aimless journey.

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Until I take Straw Hat and law's heads,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't be allowed into a base, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You stubborn, hard- headed...

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: If you just apologized, I'm sure Sakazuki'd feel the slight to his honor rectified, and...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: I refuse. I have my own honor I need to abide by.

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: Oh for crying out...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Fufufufufufu! I'm talking about Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Sengoku
dialogue.text: He's an idiot, O-tsuru-san.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This was your one and only chance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If... if only you all had joined me in putting those little shits in their place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: things wouldn't have turned out like this...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I held their reins!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The reins of this world's monsters! You shouldn't have cut off my hands... you fools.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will come to regret this, that I can assure you.

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: Quit your pathetic blabbering.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The vagaries of "If only" and "mayhaps" do not exist.

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: What Happened is what is real.

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: Plain and simple... you lost.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufu Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: My MY... I really can't hold a candle to you cold-hearted bastards... Fufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A wolf knows well what I'll beasts think.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: What will become of the world of pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allow me to answer your question with another of my own.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Having lost their feed, their chains cut... what do you think the monsters of this world will do?

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Who now stands atop this sea!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who rules these waters!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One of the emperors of the sea, the yonkou!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Or perhaps one of the sly Warlord?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or is it one of those little shits belonging to the worst genera- lion?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: could it be... the armies of justice....

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines who rule this sea?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The will of the people, the revolutionary army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Has its own share of beasts, enough to scare any good man!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and the clan of D, always smoldering amidst the Embers of History...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who can tell when and where they will appear!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who will join hands with whom!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Who will betray whom!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tell this to the tenryubito perched atop their ivory towers in mariejois!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You bas- Tards will be yanked from your golden thrones!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been 25 years since gold D. Roger first ruled the Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: his arch-energy, Whitebeard, never ascended to that throne. He ruled kneel- ing before it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What now!? In the eyes of the count- less pirates that now plow these seas,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is but one conspicuously empty throne! You do know what that means, right?

summary: Doflamingo Warns the Marines: Dressrosa begins to heal while Doflamingo's capture sends shockwaves through the seas, from the Marines to Jack and the Straw Hats' new bounties.
